facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa sits right on the beach, bright bungalows and beachfront villas, two open-air restaurants, a spa. 4.8 stars across 961 reviews. That number means something. Some resorts feel like a hotel. This one feels like you actually left. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Beachfront bungalow. Open-air dinner. Spa on the same property. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa earns its 4.8 stars the quiet way. This is what switching off actually looks like.

instagram.caption: This place fixes burnout. Beachfront villas, open-air dining, spa. 4.8★ from 961 guests at Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa. Tag your travel buddy.
instagram.video_caption: Walked in. Didn't want to leave. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa, 4.8 stars, beach right there.

tiktok.caption: The resort that actually makes you decompress. Green Bay Phu Quoc Resort & Spa, 4.8★, beach + spa + open-air dining. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocResort #VietnamTravel #TravelTips
